//: RFP_MCP — Claude Code MCP server registration for the produce-RFP pilot.
//paths: Edit `cwd` to the absolute path of the backend/ folder in your KR_RFP checkout. The command runs the stdio server from backend/.venv so the `mcp` SDK + app code resolve. The package is `rfp_mcp` (NOT `mcp`) so it never shadows the installed MCP SDK.
